text.message: Its just one of those games where yellow and blue forgot they needed balance and not make enemies early on
Red on 2 devs and open settle
Mb but I don’t make any brick and I didn’t know blue was gonna plow you
didnt know? Ever watched the map?
U put my game to bed
Well tbh if a single starting plow puts your game to bed maybe you should’ve placed differently
Sorry, didnt count for a headless trade
Final placement on that 2-6 was crazy regardless
Road settle 54 and we have a game
Blue still had great brick port
So heres blue going to 9, my question is what can yall do about it?
think he has road settle for win
